//model: Model is NOT configured here. Claude Code reads ANTHROPIC_MODEL env var. fish: set -Ux ANTHROPIC_MODEL claude-opus-4-8 | bash: add 'export ANTHROPIC_MODEL=claude-opus-4-8' to ~/.profile | Check: echo $ANTHROPIC_MODEL
//effort: effortLevel controls reasoning depth, independent of fastMode. xhigh = deep default. fastMode is a separate speed/cost knob: ~2.5x faster output at higher per-token cost (burns quota faster), WITHOUT reducing reasoning depth. Off by default to avoid the premium quota burn; flip /fast per-task for interactive speed. fast + xhigh can run together.
